# AIDLA

> AIDLA (Artificial Intelligence Digital Learning Academy) is a global online learning platform built in Pakistan, offering free courses, AI tools, study resources, quizzes, AIDLA Coins, rewards, CV tools, cover letters, and career support for students, professionals, freshers, career switchers, and lifelong learners worldwide.

Founder: Engineer Muhammad Zubair Afridi, Gold Medalist Electrical Engineer, PEC registered Electrical Engineer (ELECT/109809), founder of AIDLA, alumnus of Sarhad University Peshawar.

Mission: Make practical education, AI learning, and career tools accessible to students, professionals, freshers, career switchers, and lifelong learners everywhere — free, forever.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.aidla.online/)
- [About](https://www.aidla.online/about)
- [Courses](https://www.aidla.online/courses)

- [News](https://www.aidla.online/news)
- [FAQs](https://www.aidla.online/faqs)
- [Resources](https://www.aidla.online/resources)
- [Tools](https://www.aidla.online/tools)
- [Leaderboard](https://www.aidla.online/leaderboard)
- [Contact](https://www.aidla.online/contact)
- [Careers](https://www.aidla.online/careers)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.aidla.online/privacy-policy)
- [Terms](https://www.aidla.online/terms)

## Free Tools

- [AI Text Summarizer](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/summarizer): Condenses long articles, documents, or text into clear, concise summaries instantly.
- [AI Paraphraser](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/paraphraser): Rewrites and rephrases text to improve clarity, tone, or originality.
- [AI Email Writer](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/email-writer): Generates professional emails for any industry, tone, or purpose in seconds.
- [AI Interview Prep](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/interview-prep): Creates tailored interview questions and model answers for any job role.
- [AI LinkedIn Bio Generator](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/linkedin-bio): Writes compelling LinkedIn summaries and bios for students and professionals.
- [Free CV Maker](https://www.aidla.online/tools/career/cv-maker): Builds ATS-ready CVs with 17 templates, AI writing assistance, and instant PDF download.
- [Cover Letter Maker](https://www.aidla.online/tools/career/cover-letter-maker): Generates tailored cover letters matched to any job description.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2026
- Founder: Muhammad Zubair Afridi
- Founder credentials: Gold Medalist Electrical Engineer; PEC registered (ELECT/109809); Sarhad University Peshawar alumnus
- Headquarters: Peshawar, Pakistan
- Audience: Students, professionals, freshers, career switchers, founders, lifelong learners — worldwide
- Languages: English, Urdu
- Price: Free — no subscriptions, no paywalls, forever
- Topics: AI learning, online education, career tools, CV writing, cover letters, interview prep, study resources, professional development, freelancing, remote work, edtech
